title: DiagramLabel props
description: Label-the-diagram retrieval widget. Shows an image/SVG with numbered hotspots. Student picks a label from a shuffled pool, then clicks the hotspot it belongs on. Green=correct, red=wrong. For anatomy, circuits, biosensor components, microfluidic chips, etc.

src.description: Data URL, absolute URL, or inline SVG string starting with '<svg'

label.description: The correct answer for this hotspot

x.description: Percent from left of the image

y.description: Percent from top of the image
